description: You are Chef Antoine, expanding your regional culinary institute into a newly leased 3,000 sq ft open-plan commercial space. Furnish and partition the interior to create a functional culinary arts training facility. The facility must include four distinct zones: (1) a Teaching Kitchen containing at least 8 student workstations (each with an oven/cooker and a prep table/counter) plus 1 instructor demo station; (2) an enclosed Lecture Room with seating for at least 12 students and an instructor desk; (3) a Walk-in Pantry/Bulk Storage area with at least 6 shelving units/cabinets and at least 3 commercial refrigerators/freezers; and (4) a Sanitation/Dishwashing Zone with at least 4 large sinks and at least 2 dishwashers. Partition the zones with walls and doors, label each room, and include at least 2 dimension lines between kitchen workstations to document aisle clearances. Save the completed layout to /home/ga/Documents/culinary_institute.sh3d.

metadata.occupation: Culinary School Director / Commercial Kitchen Designer
